intake.mode_reason: Repository flow and verification topology are independent unknowns that benefit from bounded parallel research.

questions.question: Which UI and first-party service paths implement the requested journey?
questions.conclusion: The journey reads the declared profile endpoint and renders its response-derived display value.

questions.question: Which environment can prove the UI and intended service are compatible?
questions.conclusion: The shared-real profile forbids first-party mocks and exposes backend correlation.

scouts.summary: Located the response-dependent UI journey and its first-party API boundary.
Confirmed the capable shared-real profile and required provenance signals.

synthesis.outcome: The user sees the value returned by the intended service after completing the journey.
requirements: Render the real service value in the candidate UI.
constraints: Do not satisfy the required journey with a first-party mock.

goal_spec.objective: The user sees the value returned by the intended service after completing the journey.

acceptance.behavior: The user sees the value returned by the intended service after completing the journey.

checks.claim_scope: Candidate UI compatibility with the declared shared first-party API.
